_comment: Machine-readable driver registry. Fields: name, category, interface, chips, status, example, notes.

drivers.name: ssd1306
drivers.notes: 128×64 OLED. I2C Device<Bus> + SpiDevice<Spi,Dc,Cs> transport. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: st7789
drivers.notes: 240×320 TFT LCD. fill_rect, draw_pixel, blit. DcPolicy+CsPolicy templates. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: ili9341
drivers.notes: 240×320 TFT LCD. Same API as ST7789. 11-step init. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: uc8151
drivers.notes: E-paper (2.13"/2.9"). Full update, BUSY pin poll, deep-sleep. Width/Height template params. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: tm1637
drivers.notes: 4-digit 7-segment LED. GPIO bit-bang, display_number, set_brightness. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: bme280
drivers.notes: Temperature, pressure, humidity. Bosch compensation formulas. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: sht4x
drivers.notes: T+RH one-shot, CRC-8. High/medium/low repeatability. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: aht20
drivers.notes: T+RH triggered one-shot, calibration check, busy-poll. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: lps22hh
drivers.notes: Barometric pressure + temperature. One-shot mode. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: icm42688p
drivers.notes: 6-DoF IMU. Configurable accel/gyro FS + ODR. 14-byte burst. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: mpu6050
drivers.notes: 6-DoF IMU + temperature. DLPF, configurable FS, 14-byte burst. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: lsm6dsox
drivers.notes: 6-DoF IMU + temperature. 416 Hz ODR, auto-increment burst. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: lis3mdl
drivers.notes: 3-axis magnetometer. Ultra-high perf mode, configurable FS. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: w25q
drivers.notes: NOR flash. JEDEC ID, page program, sector erase. BlockDevice adapter included. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: at24mac402
drivers.notes: EEPROM + EUI-48/EUI-64 + 128-bit serial. Paged read/write. Onboard SAME70 Xplained Ultra.

drivers.name: is42s16100f
drivers.notes: 16-bit SDRAM. SDRAMC controller init. Onboard SAME70 Xplained Ultra.

drivers.name: sdcard
drivers.notes: SPI-mode SD card. CMD0/8/ACMD41/58 init, CMD17/24 block R/W. SDSC not supported.

drivers.name: fm25v10
drivers.notes: 1-Mbit FRAM. No erase, byte-granularity R/W, WREN per write. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: ksz8081
drivers.notes: Ethernet PHY. MDIO/MDC register access. Onboard SAME70 Xplained Ultra.

drivers.name: nmea_parser
drivers.notes: Stateless GPGGA/GPRMC parser. No heap, no stdlib strings. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: sx1276
drivers.notes: LoRa radio. Configurable BW/SF/CR, blocking TX+RX, RSSI. Polling-only (no DIO0). HW validation pending.

drivers.name: rc522
drivers.notes: ISO 14443-A RFID. Card detect, anti-collision, 4-byte UID read. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: max17048
drivers.notes: LiPo fuel gauge. SOC%, voltage, charge rate, alert threshold. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: ina219
drivers.notes: Power monitor. Calibration register, shunt+bus voltage, current, power. HW validation pending.

drivers.name: ina3221
drivers.notes: Triple-channel power monitor. MANUFACTURER_ID check, 3-channel burst read. HW validation pending.
